title: taraxacum cumulatum
intro: Taraxacum cumulatum, also known as the western dandelion or tall dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum cumulatum include its ability to support liver function, reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Taraxacum cumulatum can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
